title: They Told You to Farm, and You Became an Emperor?
alternative_titles: Asked to Farm, but You Became the Empire's Emperor?, 让你种田，你成帝国皇帝了, If I let you farm, will you become the emperor of the empire?
synopsis:
Manhua                    They Told You to Farm, and You Became an Emperor? yang dibuat oleh komikus bernama
                     ini bercerita tentang
                    Roman: “Aku adalah takdir kalian! Semua sujud di hadapanku!” Jadi, kamu disuruh bertani, tapi bagaimana caranya kamu bisa membangun kekaisaran sebesar ini dan menjadi kaisar?
